message:
fix: correct relative path to scoop-bucket in cross-repo tests

$REPO_DIR/../../scoop-bucket resolved to /data/scoop-bucket (wrong)
instead of /data/projects/scoop-bucket. Changed to ../scoop-bucket
which correctly finds the sibling repo. Tests were silently skipping
scoop manifest validation due to the wrong path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ test_ci_workflow_has_platform_matrix() {
 test_scoop_manifests_have_windows_urls() {
     setup_test "scoop_manifests_have_windows_urls"
 
-    local scoop_dir="$REPO_DIR/../../scoop-bucket"
+    local scoop_dir="$REPO_DIR/../scoop-bucket"
     if [[ ! -d "$scoop_dir" ]]; then
         log_test "INFO" "scoop-bucket not found alongside homebrew-tap"
         _TEST_SKIPPED=$((_TEST_SKIPPED + 1))

@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ test_no_version_pinning_in_deps() {
 test_autoupdate_config_in_scoop() {
     setup_test "autoupdate_config_in_scoop"
 
-    local scoop_dir="$REPO_DIR/../../scoop-bucket"
+    local scoop_dir="$REPO_DIR/../scoop-bucket"
     if [[ ! -d "$scoop_dir" ]]; then
         log_test "INFO" "scoop-bucket not found"
         _TEST_SKIPPED=$((_TEST_SKIPPED + 1))
